name: FunRun RightToPlay at Decathlon Bannerghatta Road
description:
Run for "Right To Play" 3km or 5km fun run with a purpose on Sunday 24th May 2026. Play for Peace & Equality, Play for All. A run to create opportunity to play.
*Part of the run proceeds go to sports for needy kids.
Features:
Finisher Medal
TShirt
Breakfast
Families are welcome
Surprise goodies for winners and runnersup
Venue: Decathlon Bannerghatta Road
Date: Sunday, 24th May, 5am onwards
Tshirt and Bibs can be collected on the event day prior to the run.
Hurry, limited entries on a first come first served basis. Come run or walk with your family for a good cause.
About Us:
At CoachDirect, our mission is to promote sports as a healthy lifestyle alternative. Since 2013, we work with many schools providing sports education at grass roots level. More about us www.coachdirect.in

name: IDOVENT MARATHON UTSAVA
description:
Marathon Utsava – returns with its 2nd Edition, continuing the spirit of fitness, endurance, and community running. After the success of the first edition at Bengaluru, this edition offers runners a well-organized and rewarding race-day experience.
Open to beginners and experienced runners alike, Marathon Utsava is designed to inspire participation, consistency, and celebration through running.
RACE CATEGORIES
5 KM – Fitness Run
• Open category
• Age limit: 18 years & above
10 KM – Timed Run
• Competitive category
• Age limit: 18 years & above
PARTICIPANT INCLUSIONS
• Official Event T-Shirt
• Bib Number
• Goodie Bag
• Finisher Medal
• E-Certificate
• Refreshment 
• Professional Event Photos
WHO CAN PARTICIPATE
Open to all fitness enthusiasts who meet the age criteria.

name: May Edition - Run and Rave at Freshpik.
description:
We start with a run around Ulsoor Lake, calm waters, early morning miles, the crew moving together.
Then we take that energy straight into Freshpik.
Protein shakes, bars, ragi cookies, mandarins, mini sandwiches, Bisleri in hand, all while the music kicks in and the space turns into a full-blown post-run rave.
Good runs. Good fuel. Great vibes.
Run hard. Rave harder. Freshpik after.

name: Wesness Women's 5k Fun Run, Bengaluru 2026
description:
Wesness Women's 5K Run – Bengaluru
Something special is coming — and you're already a part of it.
The Wesness Women's 5K Run is more than a race. It's a morning of movement, shared energy, and the quiet power of women showing up — for themselves, and for each other. We can't wait to run this one with you.
——
BIB Collection Expo
Before race day, come find us at the BIB Collection Expo. Pick up your BIB, meet your fellow runners, and let the pre-run excitement wash over you. We'd love to see you there.
Venue 1
Westside Stores, Koramangala
📍 
https://share.google/xfC007PPFEMmdwXBj
Friday, 29 May & Saturday, 30 May 2026 | 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM
Venue 2
Westside Stores, Commercial Street
📍 
https://share.google/zCHA5kyxLq8QcWCtj
Friday, 29 May & Saturday, 30 May 2026 | 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM
Walk in anytime. Your BIB will be waiting.
Please note — race BIBs will only be distributed at the expo and not on race day.
——
Race Day
Venue: RBANM's Ground
📍
https://share.google/q5PJl7jgZIRB4eXZ5
Date: Sunday, 31 May 2026
How the morning unfolds —
5:40 AM — Gates Open
Come early, soak it all in.
6:00 – 6:25 AM — Zumba Warm-Up
We're kicking things off with a high-energy Zumba session. Move your body, shake off the nerves, and get ready.
6:25 AM — Runner Line-Up & Assembly
Head to the start line. You're about to do something great.
6:40 AM — 5K Run Flag-Off
This is your moment. Go.
6:50 AM — Start Line Closes
Please ensure you're at the start line before 6:50 AM. Participants will not be permitted to begin the run after this time.
7:40 – 8:00 AM — Cool Down Session
Stretch it out. You've earned it.
8:00 AM — DJ Set Begins
Because every finish line deserves a celebration.
10:00 AM — Event Close
——
A Few Things to Keep in Mind
* No BIB, No Entry. Your race BIB is required for venue access and the race route — please don't forget it.
* BIBs will not be distributed on race day. Collect yours at the expo on 29 or 30 May.
* Spectators and family will not be permitted inside the venue.
* One BIB = one registered participant. Please do not exchange or share BIBs.
* There is no dedicated parking at the venue. We encourage you to use public transport or a ride service.
* Please ensure your personal medical insurance is valid prior to race day. The event does not provide individual medical coverage.
——
Thank you for being part of the Wesness community. This morning is yours — and we're honoured to share it with you.
See you at the start line. 💛

name: Run and Rave with PaceX and Cadance Run Club
description:
Bangalore, this one’s different.
PaceX Run Club 
and 
Cadence Run Club
 are coming together to bring you a 
Run & Rave edition
 - where your morning run turns into a full-blown vibe.
We start with a high-energy community run and finish at 
Social Bellandur

What’s in it for you:
A curated run with a strong community vibe
Post-run rave at Social Bellandur
Red Bull
 on-ground with cans to keep you going
Electrolytes, refreshments & recovery experiences from partner brands

This isn’t just a run.
 It’s a morning you show up for people, music, energy.
Limited spots. 300 runners only.

name: Persistence Run
description:
Persistence Run﻿
Resolution started the journey. Commitment kept you showing up. Now it’s time to persist.
The Persistence Run is the third event in the four-run journey that helps turn good intentions into lasting habits.
This edition of the run will be 
TIMED
, with distances going up to 10K, giving participants an opportunity to see how far their consistency has taken them since the beginning of the year.
With every step, you move closer to completing the journey - and to earning the beautiful composite medal that represents your progress through the series.
Series Finisher Reward
As part of the 4-Run Series, participants who complete all four runs will earn a special composite finisher medal - the Soaring Eagle, a symbol of consistency, strength, and commitment across the year.
Race Categories
Timed 10k
Timed 7k
Timed 5k
Non-timed 3k
Non-timed 1.6k
Participant Perks
The Unmatched BeAthlit Experience
Personalised Finisher Medal
Cool Runner's T-shirt
Snack Box
Professional Event Photos
Hydration stations every 800 Mtrs
Venue Details
Jakkur
Parking will be available near the event venue.
Event Requirements
 Open to all age groups
 Registration fees are non-refundable
 Participants must follow event rules and local regulations
 Respect the venue, volunteers, and fellow runners

name: Wesness Run2zumba Bengaluru 2026
description:
Your Morning Just Got a Major Upgrade.
This isn't your average Sunday. On 14th May, Westside Bengaluru becomes the most electric spot in the city — and you're invited.
We're talking a heart-pumping 2K run to wake you up, followed by an all-out Zumba Blast that'll have you dancing like nobody's watching (even though everyone will be). Music loud. Vibes high. Energy through the roof.
Location: Westside Bengaluru
 
Schedule:
 
6:00 AM – Reporting 
6:20 AM – Warm-up starts 
6:30 AM – 2K Run starts
7:00 AM – 2K Run ends 
7:00–7:20 AM – Water break 
7:20 AM – ZUMBA BLAST BEGINS!
7:50 AM – Refreshments Distribution
8:10 AM – Event Ends
 
What You Get:
 
* A stylish Wesness T‑shirt
* Cold Coffee and hydration
* A Zumba session that feels like a mini dance party
* Guided 2K run to start your week right
If you've been waiting for a reason to finally do something just for you — this is it.
One morning. One incredible experience. Zero regrets.
Run a little. Dance a lot. Light up Westside.
👉 Secure your spot now — before it's gone.

name: Rupee For Humanity 2026 - IIM Bengaluru
description:
Rupee For Humanity proudly presents two flagship running events — 
RFH Akshara Run 2026
 and 
RFH Juniors Run 2026
 — that bring together fitness, community spirit, and a shared commitment to creating social impact.
Organized by Rupee For Humanity, a government-registered NGO founded by passionate engineers, these events aim to promote healthy living while supporting RFH's mission to eradicate illiteracy and contribute to India's growth as a developed nation.
Both categories will be held at the prestigious 
Indian Institute of Management Bangalore (IIM-B), Bengaluru
, offering participants an unforgettable race-day experience.
RFH Akshara Run 2026
Date:
 Sunday, June 28, 2026
Time:
 6:30 AM IST
Venue:
 IIM Bengaluru
Last Date to Register:
 Wednesday, May 20, 2026
Registration Fees
Regular: ₹849
RFH Juniors Run 2026
Date:
 Sunday, June 28, 2026
Time:
 8:00 AM IST
Venue:
 IIM, Bengaluru
Last Date to Register:
 Wednesday, May 20, 2026
The RFH Juniors Run is specially designed to inspire young runners, encouraging fitness, discipline, and confidence from an early age.
Note:
 A parent or guardian must accompany participants in the Champs Run.
Registration Fees
Regular: ₹699
Race Inclusions / Giveaways
Every registered participant will receive:
Dry-fit T-shirt
Timed Race BIB
Pre, During & Post Race Hydration
Finisher's Medal
Post-Race Hot Breakfast
Medical Support
Certificate
Free Professional Race Images
Additional options:
Extra T-shirt: ₹250
Additional Breakfast Coupon: ₹100
About Rupee For Humanity
Rupee For Humanity (RFH) is a youth-driven, government-registered non-profit organization committed to eliminating illiteracy and driving meaningful social change across India. Through initiatives in education, healthcare, environmental sustainability, and community development, RFH continues to transform countless lives.
By participating, every runner becomes a part of this noble mission.
Run for a Cause
Whether you're running to challenge yourself, inspire your children, or support a meaningful cause, RFH Akshara Run 2026 and RFH Juniors Run 2026 promise a memorable and impactful experience.
Follow Us: 
Instagram

name: Green BLR 2.0
description:
Green BLR 2.0 is Bengaluru's largest green running movement.
On 16th August 2026, 5,000 runners will come together at Cubbon park for one shared mission to plant 5,000 trees and restore the city's lost greenery.
Every registration plants one sapling. Real trees. Real soil. Real impact.
Join us across three distances — 3K, 5K, and 10K and be part of the run that gives Bengaluru its green back.
Distances & Pricing
:
DISTANCE EARLY BIRD STANDARD TIMED
3K ₹499 ₹699 NO
5K ₹799 ₹999 YES
10K ₹999 ₹1,299 YES
Start & Cutoff Times
:
DISTANCE START CUTOFF MIN AGE
3K 7:00 AM 45 mins 5+
5K 6:30 AM 60 mins 8+
10K 6:00 AM 90 mins 10+
Race Inclusions
:
All distances includes:
Tree Sapling planted in your name,
T-shirt,
Medal,
Bib,
Breakfast,
Photos & Video,
5K & 10K additionally:
 Timing Chip, Timing-Certificate
Prizes
:
5K & 10K: Trophies for Overall + Age Category winners (Men & Women)
3K: Goodie bags for top 3
Bib Expo
: Details to be announced
Refund Policy
: No refunds under any circumstances
